fields.helpText: This field stores information used to describe a PAP regimen, such as a procedure and its frequency or a follow-up action. The regimen appears in abbreviated form so that it can display on several screens where there is limited space. The following abbreviations may apply to the PAP regimen string:        Symbol    Meaning    ------    -------         P       PAP      C       Colposcopy      wk      Week      m       Month      y       Year      q       Every      pp      Postpartum      x2
This field is used to order the regimens within displays or selection lists.
